entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the target crop for improvement

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by a deficiency of water

entities.name: INTEGRATED GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A strategy combining genomics and breeding to improve crop traits

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of how genes and their products work to produce a phenotype

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method to identify genomic regions associated with a trait

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: A method to narrow down the genomic interval containing a gene of interest

entities.name: MAP-BASED CLONING
entities.description: A technique to isolate a gene based on its position on a genetic map

entities.name: MOLECULAR HAPLOTYPING
entities.description: The identification of specific combinations of alleles at multiple loci

entities.name: TRANSCRIPT PROFILING
entities.description: The analysis of the complete set of RNA transcripts in a cell or tissue

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines created by crossing a donor parent with a recurrent parent to transfer a specific genomic segment

entities.name: NEAR ISOGENIC LINES
entities.description: Lines that are genetically identical except for a small, specific genomic region

entities.name: CABHLH10
entities.description: A bHLH transcription factor gene in chickpea that regulates drought response and yield

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Locus, a region of DNA associated with a quantitative trait

entities.name: YIELD TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics that determine the final agricultural yield of the crop

entities.name: G-BOX PROMOTER ELEMENT
entities.description: A cis-regulatory DNA sequence that binds transcription factors like CabHLH10

entities.name: RD22
entities.description: A gene responsive to desiccation and abscisic acid

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID
entities.description: A plant hormone that mediates responses to abiotic stress

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant converts light energy into chemical energy

entities.name: ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root system of a plant

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the above-ground parts of a plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of harvestable product produced by the plant

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: Arabidopsis thaliana, a model plant used for functional genomics

entities.name: TRANSLATIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The process of applying genomic findings to develop improved crop varieties
